channel.title: DevBlog
channel.description: A production-grade developer blog powered by Next.js and MDX.

item.title: Building Scalable Distributed Systems
item.description: Learn the core principles of building systems that scale to millions of users.

item.title: Mastering Kubernetes in Production
item.description: Best practices for deploying and managing Kubernetes clusters at scale.

item.title: The Future of Frontend: Next.js 15
item.description: What's new in Next.js 15 and how it's changing the way we build web applications.
